---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Ali Eren Doğramacı

I am an Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University.\
I am interested in data analytics, optimization, and decision-making systems.\
Through this website, I will share my work for the EMU430 Data Analytics course.

\## Education\
\
Hacettepe University\
Industrial Engineering (Bachelor's Degree)

\## Internships\
\
Meteksan Matbaacılık – Management Intern\
2025 Summer

\## Projects\
\
- VRP optimization for graduating project\
- Data analytics assignments for EMU430 course

\## Competencies\
\
- R\
- Quarto\
- Git & GitHub\
- Python (basic)\
- Data Analysis

\## Hobbies\
\
- Game development\
- Strategy games\
- Technology and programming
